bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: tmt-analyst (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 1 · Recently closed (last 14d): 1

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 重型电气设备

Owner: tmt-analyst · Thesis v5 · Ticks: 3 · Materials: 63 · Deadline: 8d left · project_id: rp_0c705e64bba94247

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 重型电气设备 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.83, 1 live facts, 13d stale, 12 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 重型电气设备's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 重型电气设备

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 重型电气设备 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.83, 1 live facts, 13d stale, 12 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 重型电气设备's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

贸易壁垒与原产地规则将美国变压器交期拉长至154.5-240周，导致新建数据中心通电时点推迟12-24个月并反向施压芯片硬件需求evidence ref。燃机核心机与升压变压器等物理及监管约束倒逼大单错峰交付，推迟AI集群实际送电点并利好存量基荷资产价值evidence ref。尽管算力硬件端面临有卡无电的去库存与估值折价风险，但订单簿确认AI CapEx已深度传导至电力硬件，结构性确立重型电气设备的长线稀缺租金evidence refevidence refevidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 关税拉长变压器交期至154.5-240周，推迟通电并施压半导体evidence ref
  • 燃机大单受制于变压器及管道等约束被迫错峰，利好存量基荷evidence ref
  • 电力瓶颈延期导致算力硬件订单下修，英稳达等龙头估值折价evidence ref
  • 订单簿确认AI CapEx向电力硬件传导，支撑设备稀缺租金evidence ref
